title: Onboarding - Screens in dark mode
scenario: Onboarding screens do not render correctly in dark mode when phone is set to dark mode
steps: 1. Set the phone's system theme to Dark Mode (Settings → Display → Dark theme).
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. If not a fresh install, clear app data or reinstall the app to trigger the onboarding flow.
4. Observe each onboarding screen as it appears (e.g., Welcome, Permissions, Device Pairing prompts).
5. For each screen, verify that all UI elements (text, buttons, illustrations, logos) are rendered correctly.
6. Compare the displayed colors, images, and layout against the Figma design specification for dark mode.
expected: All onboarding screens display correctly in dark mode. All elements, images, and colors match the Figma design specification.
